title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF LAGNAS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BAUAN, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, TO SAN PASCUAL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 537 / 55 OG No. 21, 3823 (May 25, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2149, April 24, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF LAGNAS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BAUAN, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, TO SAN PASCUAL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Lagnas in the Municipality of Bauan, Province of Batangas, is changed to San Pascual.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, April 24, 1959.
